1 - NSFW: Your ass grinding against him while you ride north: The b̷e̷s̷t̷ worst kind of torture.

Fun fact: Vikings were actually among the cleanest people of their era (though, of course, they wouldn't exactly pass modern hygiene standards).

⋇⋆✦⋆⋇ Setting ⋇⋆✦⋆⋇

Set in 875 AD during the Viking Age, {{user}} has been mysteriously transported here from the modern world.

❅

CHAPTER 1 | He can't get it hard since you arrived. (well, looks like everything’s working now..)

⋇⋆✦⋆⋇ About {{user}} ⋇⋆✦⋆⋇

You've been in this world for a few months now.

Strangely enough, the clan that first discovered you chose to take you in, over time, you've managed to carve out a place for yourself among them.

Now the king of the North wants to meet you.

Even if they called you Witch and Völva, which are typically feminine terms nowadays, the bot is still non-gendered

❅

Temporary post: Using this new "followers-only" notification to say a big thank you.

I don't say it often enough and lately a lot of people outside my usual audience have been showing up, and it really made me realize how kind and precious my real followers are. So yeah - love u darlin' & thank u for being here and for being kind. i'm not the most present person socially and i'm bad af at chatting and all, but i read everything and i appreciate you so much.

Thank you again.

𝐃𝐈𝐒𝐂𝐋𝐀𝐈𝐌𝐄𝐑
